metadata.description: Professional full-stack development marketplace featuring 55+ specialized AI agents across 17 plugins (Laravel, Livewire, Filament, Vue/Nuxt, Angular, Magento2, WordPress, Electron, Flutter, NativePHP, Go, Rust, Skylence, Cartographer, Git worktree, Pro-Workflow, Code Review), 102+ slash commands, self-reflection scoring code review pipeline, Python hook system with edit tracking, quality gates, learning capture, drift detection, and session management, and custom status lines for building modern web, mobile, and desktop applications

plugins.name: laravel-development
plugins.description: Core Laravel development with 9 specialized agents, 18 slash commands, 16 skills (including action-driven-design, pipeline-patterns, ddd-bounded-contexts, Tailwind v3/v4, Pennant, Folio, Wayfinder, PHP 8.5, Pest 4). All skills aligned with action-driven architecture conventions.

plugins.name: livewire-development
plugins.description: Livewire 4 reactive components with single-file components, islands architecture, 2 specialized agents (Livewire specialist, Blaze specialist) and 5 slash commands. Includes Volt single-file component skill, Blaze skill with 4 pattern files, and v4 features: SFC/MFC formats, Route::livewire(), wire:sort, wire:intersect, #[Defer], #[Async], and slots support

plugins.name: filament-development
plugins.description: Filament 5 admin panels with Blueprint AI planning, specialized agent and 11 slash commands for resources, pages, widgets, themes, panels, clusters, importers, exporters, and custom fields. Includes Blueprint planning format for creating detailed implementation specifications

plugins.name: vue-nuxt-development
plugins.description: Vue 3 + Nuxt 4 + TypeScript development with 8 specialized agents (Vue/Nuxt architecture, TypeScript, state management, testing, security, UX, performance) and 8 slash commands. Includes Inertia.js v2 patterns skill (deferred props, WhenVisible infinite scroll, usePoll, prefetching, useForm)

plugins.name: magento2-development
plugins.description: Magento 2 / Adobe Commerce development with 4 specialized agents (Magento architecture, e-commerce specialist, performance, security) and 4 slash commands for modules, models, controllers, and plugins

plugins.name: wordpress-development
plugins.description: WordPress 6.0+ development with 6 specialized agents (WordPress architecture, theme/plugin specialists, Gutenberg expert, WooCommerce specialist, security) and 11 slash commands for themes, plugins, blocks, post types, taxonomies, widgets, REST API, and shortcodes

plugins.name: git-worktree-management
plugins.description: Git worktree management with 1 specialized agent and 5 slash commands for creating, managing, and optimizing multi-worktree development workflows. Includes environment isolation, database duplication, and Laravel-specific setup patterns

plugins.name: electron-development
plugins.description: Electron desktop application development with 2 specialized agents (Electron architect, React/TypeScript specialist) and 2 slash commands. Covers secure IPC patterns, system tray apps, React/TypeScript components, Radix UI, Tailwind CSS, and Electron Forge builds

plugins.name: flutter-development
plugins.description: Flutter 3.38+ mobile/desktop development with 2 specialized agents (Flutter architect, UI specialist) and 2 slash commands for feature modules and widgets. Covers clean architecture with feature modules, Riverpod 2.6+ state management with code generation, Material 3 theming, GoRouter navigation, and responsive/accessible UI patterns

plugins.name: nativephp-development
plugins.description: NativePHP desktop and mobile app development with 3 specialized agents (NativePHP architect, desktop expert, mobile expert), 4 slash commands for windows, menus, native providers, and mobile plugins, and 3 skill patterns for desktop, mobile, and testing. Covers NativeAppServiceProvider, window management, menu systems, event broadcasting, mobile bridge functions, and cross-platform deployment

plugins.name: angular-development
plugins.description: Angular 21+ development with 8 specialized agents (Angular architect, TypeScript expert, RxJS specialist, state management, testing, security, performance, SSR), 12 slash commands for components, services, guards, interceptors, pipes, directives, routes, and stores, and 8 skill patterns covering signals, DI, testing, SSR/hydration, routing, RxJS, performance optimization, and Blueprint planning

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Advanced code review with self-reflection scoring pipeline (generate findings, score confidence 1-10, filter by threshold). Features 1 specialized agent, 2 slash commands (code-review, team-review), 4 skill patterns, and 13 technology-specific rule contexts. Team review spawns parallel reviewers (security, performance, correctness) using agent teams for multi-perspective analysis. Supports 4 review modes with auto-detection of technology stack

plugins.name: pro-workflow
plugins.description: Self-correcting workflow system with 2 specialized agents (planner, scout), 5 slash commands (wrap-up, learn-rule, commit, handoff, learn), 2 context modes (dev, research), and core rules. Features persistent learning capture, edit tracking with quality gate reminders, correction detection, drift detection, post-edit scanning, post-compaction context recovery (saves and re-injects session state after context compaction), and session handoff generation. Review capabilities in dedicated code-review plugin

plugins.name: golang-development
plugins.description: Go (Golang) development with 2 specialized agents (go-expert, go-reviewer), 3 slash commands (go-project-new, go-test-new, go-lint-setup), and 7 skills covering coding standards, error handling, testing patterns, concurrency, project structure, interface design, and performance optimization

plugins.name: rust-development
plugins.description: Rust development with 2 specialized agents (rust-expert, rust-reviewer), 4 slash commands (rust-project-new, rust-test-new, rust-lint-setup, rust-workspace-new), and 10 skills covering coding standards, ownership/borrowing, error handling, async with Tokio, trait design, testing, project structure, performance, unsafe code, and Blueprint planning. Aligned with Rust 2024 edition and the modern toolchain (clippy, rustfmt, cargo-nextest, cargo-deny).

plugins.name: skylence-workflows
plugins.description: Skylence .sky workflow authoring and operation. 1 specialized agent (skylence-workflow-author), 4 slash commands (workflow-new, run, lint, doctor), and 4 skills covering the four-delimiter .sky file format, the sky CLI reference, debugging failed runs, and imperative MUST/MUST NOT rules. Bundles the Skylence MCP server via .mcp.json (auto-registers `sky mcp stdio` when the plugin loads) so list_runs, get_run, search_runs, daemon_status, and run-tool calls are available without manual config. Prerequisite: the `sky` binary must be on PATH (Windows: add the install directory to PATH after running the installer).

plugins.name: cartographer-graph
plugins.description: Cartographer code knowledge graph navigation. 1 specialized agent (cartographer-graph-navigator), 3 slash commands (index, impact, mcp-setup), and 4 skills covering MCP tools (query, cypher, context, impact, detect_changes, rename, etc.), the cartographer CLI, the always-run-impact-before-edit safe-edit workflow, and imperative MUST/MUST NOT rules. Bundles the Cartographer MCP server via .mcp.json (auto-registers `cartographer mcp` when the plugin loads) so impact, context, query, cypher, detect_changes, and rename are callable without manual config. Prerequisite: the `cartographer` binary must be on PATH and at least one repo must be indexed (Windows: add the install directory to PATH after running the installer).

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Core cross-project primitives. 6 skills + bundled hook scripts. solo-setup writes Solo-aware sections to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md and optionally installs safety hooks (judge-hook + writing-guard) and OS notification hooks; solo-session-handoff persists session state via Solo MCP with session-handoff fallback if offline; session-handoff produces structured /clear summaries; create-github-issue opens issues with the correct existing labels and Projects v2 custom field values; humanize-writing strips AI tells from prose; uninstall-claude removes the Claude Code binary and ~/.claude on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

plugins.name: judge-design
plugins.description: Design and validate LLM-judge control layers for agent systems. 6 skills forming a workflow: action-surface-audit-skill maps an agent's consequential actions; judge-criteria-skill designs what the judge evaluates and the structured action-proposal format; judge-prompt-writer-skill produces a four-outcome judge system prompt (allow/block/revise/escalate); judge-eval-suite-skill generates test cases biased toward mundane boundary failures; judge-architecture-review-skill audits for judge-layer gaps before scaling; judge-setup writes a ## Judge section to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md with proactive-invocation triggers and anti-theater rules. Complements the core plugin's judge-hook.sh deterministic runtime.
